pr.title: docs: sync Rebecca learnings to post-split file structure
pr.body:
## Summary

Cherry-picked from a Replit Agent commit (`9088c7a9`, authored 2026-05-10) and shipped via a clean branch off `origin/main` per CC branch hygiene discipline. **No CC review skipped** — this PR is the review.

Two `docs/solutions/architecture-patterns/` learnings drift after the 2026-05-10 file-splitting sprint (tasks 1333–1342). This PR updates them to point at the new file locations.

## Why ship this Replit Agent commit

- The file paths called out by these learnings no longer resolve after the split. Future agents searching for `chat/rebecca-tools.ts` or `routes/chat.ts` will not find what the learnings describe.
- Content is purely documentation maintenance — no code change, no behavioral change.
- The cherry-pick preserves Replit Agent authorship; review surface here lets us still apply CC review before merge.

## What changed

**`agent-native-parity-audit-workflow-2026-05-10.md`** — Step 3 (Add each tool) now reflects the three-file pattern: tool defs live in per-domain `rebecca-tool-defs-<domain>.ts`, dispatch in `rebecca-tool-dispatch.ts`, implementations in `rebecca-tool-impls-<domain>.ts`. Picks `<domain>` from {property, scenario, deck, slide-factory, iris, kb, admin}. `DataChangedEntry` union extension instructions now point at `rebecca-tool-types.ts`. `RebeccaPanel.tsx` SSE block line numbers updated (now ~468 and ~662).

**`rebecca-agent-native-architecture-2026-05-09.md`** — Adds a 2026-05-10 update banner noting the file split, with the thin re-export barrel preserving all `import { … } from "../chat/rebecca-tools"` resolution. Updated paths throughout:
- `dispatchRebeccaTool()` → `chat/rebecca-tool-dispatch.ts`
- `DataChangedEntry` → `chat/rebecca-tool-types.ts`
- `getRebeccaTools()` → `chat/rebecca-tool-definitions.ts` (assembled from per-domain `rebecca-tool-defs-*.ts`)
- `runAgenticLoop` → `routes/chat-loop.ts`; `callLlm` → `routes/chat-llm.ts`; `appendToolResults` → `routes/chat-sse.ts`
- DataChangedEntry union expanded from 12 → 16 entity types (adds `company`, `market_rate`, `property_finder`, `service_template`)
- Tool registry note updated from 50+ to 70+ tools

## Test plan

- [x] `git diff origin/main...HEAD --name-only` — only the two doc files
- [x] Both updated learnings still parse as valid Markdown (rendered in PR)
- [ ] Reviewer: spot-check one renamed path resolves to a real file (e.g. `artifacts/api-server/src/chat/rebecca-tool-dispatch.ts`)

## Companion to

A separate empty Replit Agent commit (`8fbe53c3` — "restart stopped workflows for logo login", zero file changes) is being dropped, not shipped.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
